ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the financial document:  ABM International Limited has filed a routine compliance certificate for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, as per SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018. This document confirms that its Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, Beetal Financial & Computer Services Pvt. Ltd., properly processed all securities received for dematerialization, ensuring they were listed on exchanges and the corresponding physical certificates were mutilated and cancelled. This is a standard compliance filing demonstrating adherence to regulatory requirements for share transfers and ownership, with no red flags or material negative impacts identified.
